untranslatable_reason: Diamond pattern requires identification of specific points A, B, C which are chart pattern formations not available as indicators. The signal also requires measurement rule calculations (Point A - Point B arithmetic) which cannot be expressed as simple indicator conditions. Donchian channels used as proxy for breakout detection, but true diamond geometric detection is untranslatable.
translation_notes: Used Donchian Channel upper/lower bands (dc_upper/dc_lower) as a proxy for breakout confirmation in either direction since the signal specifies 'breakout in either direction'. The midpoint (dc_middle) approximates the diamond base for exit/reversal logic. However, this is a simplified interpretation—authentic diamond pattern recognition requires visual pattern identification of A-B-C points and measurement rule calculations (subtract/add Point A-B distances), which are beyond the scope of available technical indicators. Success rates noted: bearish 69%, average decline 17%.
